Morgan Stanley, defined benefit plan (value not readily ascertainable) Eligible for $2,028 per mo. from 4/1/25 or $2,605 per mo. from 12/1/31
I sold all 1,027 shares of Morgan Stanley stock purchased in my ESPP account for $126,332 on 3/5/2025 following my government appointment and termination event from Morgan Stanley (2022-05-01)

A previous plan no longer offered by Morgan Stanley called the Select Employees Capital Appreciation Plan allowed for deferring earned compensation to be paid in future years, which I put a portion of my 1997 cash bonus into and will receive a payout starting in 2026. (1995-05-01)
I continue to participate in this defined contribution plan. The plan sponsor ceased making contributions at my separation. (1995-05-01)
I will continue to participate in this defined benefit plan. (1995-05-01)

I sold all of the Morgan Stanley shares that I received annually upon vesting/conversion events, and sold all Morgan Stanley shares received in the accelerated vesting/conversion event upon entering government service and I own zero Morgan Stanley shares as a result of these sales.

I received RSUs each year as part of my compensation, which vested three years after issuance and converted to freely tradeable shares of Morgan Stanley stock which were sold.  Upon entering government service and a termination event from Morgan Stanley my unvested remaining RSUs were accelerated and vested and sold. (1995-05-01)
